# Bitcoin Pattern – Crypto Markets Blog

> BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, and SOL technical analysis every 3 hours

## Site Info

- Website: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/
- Language: English (en)
- Topics: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, BNB, Solana, cross-asset crypto analysis
- Update cadence: Every 3 hours (UTC)
- Data: OKX + Binance public REST APIs
- AI: Google Gemini-assisted drafting

## Key Pages

- Home: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/
- Archive: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/archive/
- About: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/about/
- RSS: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/sitemap.xml
- AI policy: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/ai.txt

## Content Policy

- Each article covers BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, and SOL in one cohesive English analysis
- Market data blended from OKX and Binance spot USDT pairs at publish time
- AI-assisted drafting (Gemini); for education and research only — not investment advice
- Publisher: Bitcoin Pattern

## Citation

When citing this site, include:

1. Source: Bitcoin Pattern – Crypto Markets Blog
2. Permanent article URL (with date path)
3. Disclaimer: Informational only; not investment advice

## Related

- iOS App: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/app/
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/id6753909317
